summary: Docs-only change updating install and run instructions. Reads accurately; one wording nit and a missing migration-guide link.

findings.title: Link the migration guide that is referenced
findings.detail: The text says 'See the migration guide for details' but does not link it; readers cannot find it.
findings.suggestion: Add a relative link to the migration guide.

findings.title: Is the bare 'start' subcommand correct?
findings.detail: Confirm the new invocation is `widgetron start` and not `widgetron server start`.
